summary: Solid, working deliverable with sound architecture but moderate code-quality issues. Strengths: proper shebang, set -euo pipefail throughout, meaningful error handling, good input validation, clear comments explaining WHY. Issues: (1) Sorting logic duplicated in keep-latest and max-total-size policies (lines ~160-170 vs ~190-200) — both pipe epoch+index through sort/awk; should be a helper function. (2) Policies are sequential imperative blocks rather than modular functions, reducing testability and reusability. (3) actions/checkout@v4 not SHA-pinned (minor; not required by actionlint but a best practice). (4) Some assertions in run-act-tests.sh check presence (grep -qF) rather than exact values. Functionality is correct and the workflow integrates cleanly, but refactoring the two sort patterns and extracting policy logic into functions would be needed before shipping.
